exceptions.reason: No role="grid" anywhere -- the day/hour layout is built entirely from plain <div>s.
No role="row" anywhere -- hours and days are positioned absolutely, not laid out as ARIA rows.
No role="gridcell" (or columnheader/rowheader) anywhere -- day columns and event blocks carry no cell semantics.

The outer <section> does carry aria-label (a computed schedule title, e.g. "Schedule, Jul 20 - 26"), but no element anywhere carries role="grid" for that label to describe -- there is no grid element this requirement can attach to.

No tabIndex anywhere in the grid area. Individual events become native <button> elements when `onEventClick` is set, each its own stop in the normal Tab sequence -- the opposite of one roving stop for the whole grid.

Calendar implements no keyboard navigation of the grid at all -- no onKeyDown handler exists anywhere in the file. The Previous/Next/Today controls are separate native buttons, not arrow-key navigation of the day/time grid itself. This is a defect, recorded so it stops looking like a component nobody had anything to say about.
Same as ArrowKeys -- no keyboard handling of the grid exists at all.
Same as ArrowKeys -- no keyboard handling of the grid exists at all.
